title: Angelic Elytra
description: A retexture of the elytra in Minecraft! This makes the elytra look like a pair of angel wings, hope you like it!
body:
Hey! This is a simple retexture of the elytra wings in minecraft, and thats really it! Nothing else to really say other than thank you for clicking on this and i hope you enjoy it! 









There may be other projects in the future, maybe other retextures of armor and others!
